arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the AWS Backup Vault.

id.description: The ID of the AWS Backup Vault.

kms_key_arn.description: The ARN of the KMS key used to encrypt the backup vault.

recovery_points.description: The number of recovery points stored in the backup vault.

tags.description: A map of tags assigned to the AWS Backup Vault.
